2.description: Get 200-year storm-surge areas filtered by return period

3.description: Transform storm-surge areas to metric CRS for spatial join

4.description: Get 1 km grid cells filtered by kommunenummer for Kristiansand

5.description: Transform grid cells to same metric CRS as storm-surge areas

6.description: Find grid cells intersecting storm-surge areas

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).
